figure.title: 64B/66B Block Mapping
figure.purpose: Shows the mapping of TL Flit sectors to the 64B/66B encoding payload blocks.

technical_summary: Illustrates a block of 8 bytes (D0 to D7) plus a 2-bit Sync Header (SH) forming a 66-bit block.
Shows specific flit sectors (e.g., S29.B0, S0.B0) being mapped into the data payload D0-D7 of the 64B/66B encoding structure.

packet_layout.description: Data payload bytes mapped from flit sectors.

critical_facts: TL Flit bytes are mapped sequentially into the 8-byte payload of standard 64B/66B blocks.
